inviteDesc: Share this unique invite code with your friends so they can join your trip {{title}}.
suggestAndVoteDesc: Pick spots from the map and let your group rank them.
howToStep1: Tell your friends to sign in to TripFlow
howToStep2: Go to the Trips page and click "Join Trip Using Code"
howToStep3: Paste or enter the code to instantly join
noPlacesScheduledDesc: Drag and schedule your voted candidate places on the time grid to build a beautiful timeline.
noStopsDay: No stops scheduled for this day.
